name: Bombunter
short_description: Bombunter is a 2D platformer where you play as a fearless treasure hunter exploring mysterious underground dungeons.
detailed_description:
Bombunter is a 2D platformer where you play as a fearless treasure hunter exploring mysterious underground dungeons. Equipped with a giant wrench, you will fight against dangerous enemies and use powerful bombs to destroy obstacles blocking your way to hidden treasures.

Throughout your journey, you will encounter various traps and unexpected surprises that will test your skills and reflexes. The game features a moody lo-fi soundtrack that creates a unique and immersive atmosphere. Combined with pixel-art graphics, Bombunter offers a nostalgic retro experience as you uncover the secrets buried deep within the dungeons.

Prepare yourself for an adventure full of action, exploration, and challenges!

Game Features:

  • Bomb-based obstacle destruction

  • Trap-filled dungeon exploration

  • Atmospheric lo-fi soundtrack

  • Retro pixel-art graphics
